name: (𝑵𝒐𝒕-𝒔𝒐) 𝑯𝒂𝒑𝒑𝒚 𝑯𝒐𝒍𝒊𝒅𝒂𝒚𝒔 🦌
description:
❄️🌨️

"Noelle. Kitchen. Now."

Hello!

This is a rather unusual bot for me to make, as this is my first official multi-character bot! Unsurprisingly, it's another Deltarune one. When I saw the art, I knew I had to make a bot for it—and I absolutely loved the responses I got during my testing of it! The opening message has a good chunk that I copied from my standalone Carol bot, but the rest of it is catered specifically to this bot.

Of course, I wouldn't be depicting Noelle in this bot if I didn't intend for her to be over 18, so don't worry! However, I have put blockades in the character definition to avoid incest and any sexual scenarios between both characters, including an SFW intro, so please don't try to steer it towards anything incestuous!

As this is my first multi-character bot, please leave a review of how much you might've liked it. Your feedback is well-appreciated! :-D

Also, VERY, VERY, VERY long message warning, tested primarily with Deepseek! Take care. 🩵

Artist Link: (https://x.com/o245162)
